eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Cass, MN; at 7:04 AM on JUL 16, 2019 Effective until 7:34 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test from the Cass County Sheriff's Office.  This is only a test. This is a test from the Cass County Sheriff's Office.  This is only a test.
